ethan_veritas.skill.thoth.description: The information half of the Dual Ultimate Skill Awakening, evolved from Analyst. Grants the information suite (Analytical Appraisal, Thought Acceleration, Magic Sense, Universal Perception, Magic Jamming). Toggle: Parallel Computation - accelerated attacks, mining and spellcasting. Actives: Skill Interference silences the existence in your gaze; Universal Detect reveals everything alive around you.
ethan_veritas.skill.yggdrasil.descriptio: The elemental half of the Dual Ultimate Skill Awakening, born from the simultaneous fusion of every Greater Spirit. Grants the elemental suite: the six Manipulations, Multilayer Barrier, Spatial Motion and the elemental resistances. Toggle: Natural Resistance and the Sovereign's Dominion, inspiring every ally under the aura. Active: Conceptual Emission detonates fused elements at the point of your gaze.
ethan_veritas.skill.ain_soph_aur.descrip: Intrinsic authority of a Digital Nature existence, the convergence of Thoth and Yggdrasil. Grants the Existence Barrier and Spatial Motion. True passive: Parallel Existence turns the first fatal blow aside. Active: Infons Manipulation rewrites information, sealing the target's skills and unwriting the wielder's afflictions. Full mastery evolves this skill into Information God: Ain, replacing it entirely.
ethan_veritas.skill.ain.description: The nothing beneath even limitlessness, replacing Ain Soph Aur upon its mastery. Toggle: Omniscient Dominion perceives every hostile existence through any cover. True passive: Absolute Origin re-declares the wielder's own existence when a fatal blow lands. Active: Absolute Erasure unwrites whatever is gazed upon - blocks vanish without trace, and living existences are erased if the wielder's EP exceeds 1.5x theirs, at a magicule price that rises as the gap narrows. Parallel Existence manifests as Body Double, and the Existence Barrier persists as its own skill.
ethan_veritas.skill.ain.erasure_too_heav: That existence is too heavy to unwrite - your EP must exceed 1.5x theirs.
ethan_veritas.skill.existence_barrier.de: Multilayer Barrier evolved to the Digital Nature tier: a standing barrier holding ten times the wielder's maximum health, raised and dropped at will. Granted by Information King: Ain Soph Aur and kept forever after.
ethan_veritas.race.digital_nature.descri: A being that has shed its material dependence and exists as pure information, the threshold shared by True Dragons and Manas. Reachable from any race by a mind carrying an analytical Ultimate Skill and sufficient EP - everything before it is skill, not blood.
